text_original: Suppose a man enters tlie orchard of another and steals the other’s peaches and plums.
text_normalized: Suppose a man enters tlie orchard of another and steals the other’s peaches and plums.

text_original: Hearing of it the public will condemn it ; laying hold of him the authorities will punish him.
text_normalized: Hearing of it the public will condemn it ; laying hold of him the authorities will punish him.

text_original: Because he injures others to profit himself.
text_normalized: Because he injures others to profit himself.

text_original: As to seizing dogs, pigs, chickens, and young pigs from another, it is even more unrighteous than to steal peaches and plums from his orchard.
text_normalized: As to seizing dogs, pigs, chickens, and young pigs from another, it is even more unrighteous than to steal peaches and plums from his orchard.

text_original: Because it causes others to suffer more, and it is more inhumane and criminal.
text_normalized: Because it causes others to suffer more, and it is more inhumane and criminal.

text_original: When it comes to entering another’s stable and appropriating the other’s horses and oxen, it is more inhumane than to seize the dogs, pigs, chickens, and young pigs of another.
text_normalized: When it comes to entering another’s stable and appropriating the other’s horses and oxen, it is more inhumane than to seize the dogs, pigs, chickens, and young pigs of another.

text_original: Because others are caused to suffer more ; when others are caused to suffer more, then the act is more inhumane and criminal.
text_normalized: Because others are caused to suffer more ; when others are caused to suffer more, then the act is more inhumane and criminal.

text_original: Finally, as to murdering the innocent, stripping him of his clothing, dispossessing him of his spear and sword, it is even more unrighteous than to enter another’s stable and appropriate his horses and oxen.
text_normalized: Finally, as to murdering the innocent, stripping him of his clothing, dispossessing him of his spear and sword, it is even more unrighteous than to enter another’s stable and appropriate his horses and oxen.

text_original: Because it causes others to suffer more ; when others are caused to suffer more, then the act is more inhumane and criminal All the gentlemen of the world know that they should condemn these things, calling them umighteous.
text_normalized: Because it causes others to suffer more ; when others are caused to suffer more, then the act is more inhumane and criminal All the gentlemen of the world know that they should condemn these things, calling them umighteous.

text_original: But when it comes to the great attack of states, they do not know that they should condemn it.
text_normalized: But when it comes to the great attack of states, they do not know that they should condemn it.

text_original: On the contrary, they applaud it, calling it righteous.
text_normalized: On the contrary, they applaud it, calling it righteous.

text_original: Can this be said to he knowing the difference between righteousness and unrighteousness 1 The murder of one person is called unrighteous and incurs one death penalty.
text_normalized: Can this be said to he knowing the difference between righteousness and unrighteousness 1 The murder of one person is called unrighteous and incurs one death penalty.

text_original: Following this argument, the murder of ten persons will be ten times as unrighteous and there should be ten death penalties ; the murder of a hundred persons will be a hundred times as unrighteous and there should be a hundred death penalties.
text_normalized: Following this argument, the murder of ten persons will be ten times as unrighteous and there should be ten death penalties ; the murder of a hundred persons will be a hundred times as unrighteous and there should be a hundred death penalties.

text_original: All the gentlemen of the world know that they should condemn these things, calling them unrighteous.
text_normalized: All the gentlemen of the world know that they should condemn these things, calling them unrighteous.

text_original: But when it comes to the great unrighteousness of attacking states, they do not know that they should condemn it.
text_normalized: But when it comes to the great unrighteousness of attacking states, they do not know that they should condemn it.

text_original: On the contrary, they applaud it, calling it righteous.
text_normalized: On the contrary, they applaud it, calling it righteous.

text_original: And they are really ignorant of its being unrighteous.
text_normalized: And they are really ignorant of its being unrighteous.

text_original: Hence they have recorded their judgment to bequeath to their posterity.
text_normalized: Hence they have recorded their judgment to bequeath to their posterity.

text_original: If they did know that it is unrighteous, then why would they record their false judgment to bequeath to posterity ?
text_normalized: If they did know that it is unrighteous, then why would they record their false judgment to bequeath to posterity ?

text_original: Now, if there were a man who, upon seeing a little blackness, should say it is black, but, upon seeing much, should say it is white , then we should think he could not tell the difference between black and white.
text_normalized: Now, if there were a man who, upon seeing a little blackness, should say it is black, but, upon seeing much, should say it is white , then we should think he could not tell the difference between black and white.

text_original: If, upon tasting a little bitterness one should say it is bitter, but, upon tasting much, should say it is sweet ; then we should think he could not tell the difference between bitter and sweet.
text_normalized: If, upon tasting a little bitterness one should say it is bitter, but, upon tasting much, should say it is sweet ; then we should think he could not tell the difference between bitter and sweet.

text_original: Kow, when a little wrong is committed people know that they should condemn itj but when such a great wrong as attacking a state is com-initted people do not know that they should condemn it.
text_normalized: Kow, when a little wrong is committed people know that they should condemn itj but when such a great wrong as attacking a state is com-initted people do not know that they should condemn it.

text_original: On the contrary, it is applauded, called righteous.
text_normalized: On the contrary, it is applauded, called righteous.

text_original: Can this be said to be knowing the difference between the righteous and the unrighteous ?
text_normalized: Can this be said to be knowing the difference between the righteous and the unrighteous ?

text_original: Hence we know the gentlemen of the world are confused about the difference between righteous-ness and unrighteousness.
text_normalized: Hence we know the gentlemen of the world are confused about the difference between righteous-ness and unrighteousness.
